content_fingerprint: llama cpp lands internal cleanup fix for debug module in latest release a patch release of the widely used llama cpp inference runtime fixes missing symbol exports and reduces header file dependencies that caused build failures under link time optimization the llama cpp project tagged release b8943 on april 27 2026 containing two targeted changes to its common debug utilities the first commits a fix for missing exports in llama common pr 22340 and the second restructures the debug header to reduce transitive include dependencies across translation units concretely the patch moves a boolean abo
